title: parosela neglecta
side_effects: Parosela neglecta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing vomiting, dizziness, and stomach pain in individuals who consume it in excess. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile compounds has also been linked to respiratory issues, including asthma and bronchitis. In rare cases, improper use of parosela neglecta may lead to an allergic reaction, causing symptoms like hives, itching, and swelling. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for health benefits to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
